evidence: In order to remain competitive, we have made, and expect to continue to make, significant investments in research and development... including our custom AI accelerators or XPUs, network switches and other AI-related products
our AI-related product engineers and cybersecurity experts, are a significant asset. Competition for these employees is significant in many areas of the world

Failure to successfully develop increasingly advanced technologies, including our custom AI accelerators or XPUs, network switches and other AI-related products... could impair our competitive position

Risk disclosure scored 4 because company-specific AI risk mechanisms are described (customer default risk on AI infrastructure spend, gross margin compression from XPU leasing, AI-enhanced cyberattack sophistication), but no quantified risk figures or named governance/oversight bodies appear in the excerpts.
